Iksar Berserker Club  
 

Lore Item Placeable
Slot: PRIMARY SECONDARY
Skill: 1H Blunt Atk Delay: 18
DMG: 7 Dmg Bonus: 35
This item is placeable in yards, guild yards, houses and guild halls.
STR: +4 WIS: +4 INT: -2
Effect: Fleeting Fury (Combat, Casting Time: Instant) at Level 10
WT: 8.0 Size: MEDIUM
Class: ALL except NEC WIZ MAG ENC BER
Race: ALL
Slot 1, Type 4 (Weapon: General)
Slot 2, Type 20 (Ornamentation)
Iksar Berserker Club
Lore Item Placeable

Drops

This item is found on creatures.

Karnor's Castle
NPC Name

an undead jester

Iksar Berserker Club

# Oct 02 2016 at 11:47 AM Rating: Excellent
snailish
4,580 posts
Item window pic we have of this item is okay, but a current example would be better.

A pic of someone wielding it would be best. Preferably Judd the ranger...

Mugali wrote:
Arrrrgh. Ugh. Doh. Weeeeraawrroooarg!Oh Tunare please please help me. I didnt want to go here again. I camped the Jester for about 50 hours of game time. I killed hundreds of badgers and bones. I displayed monumental patience. I foraged 2 backpacks worth of food. I looted almost all the badger armor. Oh Tunare why do you curse me so? This item is like a tortuous demon of the mind. Yeah, I want one. But I had to leave after 50 hours, no exp, the littering of the floor of much fine copper and silver, and 473 cups of coffee. Plus I stuck a pencil in my eye and ate a can of salt. Now I read these posts and what does the stoopid ranger want to do? GO BACK! Camp the jester. Da da de da dum da de da. It is the fault of all who post here. I must have this item. You have inspired (cursed) me to go back. Besides, it's too late now. I've spent too much time already. I will now camp this until the end of time. Perhaps I will become the Jester. Yes, Yes. Judd the Undead Jester. If you see him give him some salt and a pencil.

GBATE!! Never saw it coming

Been camping this item for several months, mostly to hand out to n00bz because I'm nice like that.


1) Thick boned skeleton is the PH for the jester. Killing anything else is irrelevant.
2) Just for the heck of it I put in bazaar for 12K (Bristle Server). Sold 2 in a week at that price. Crazy right?

My 23 Ikky bst just got one tonight (3/20). With all the high level players looking for the excavator claws for the scavenger hunt, I was able to walk right to the stables without running into a single mob. Any low level players who want this, I suggest going while the scavenger hunt is still on, it's so easy to get down there!!

also, the spawn info/guide here is correct.

good luck

PS: fantastic weapon for low levels, with the proc and the low delay.

# Mar 29 2004 at 8:58 AM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1592793280366

I can confirm this club drops.
I killed the jester Friday night - no club. I camped right there and went to sleep.
Next time I jumped on I was being attacked by the jester. I killed him - bingo he had the club.
Total camp time 10 minutes. Jesters killed - 2.
My level 11 cleric very happy.

▲ Page top
Jester Spawn Info
QuoteReply
# Feb 26 2004 at 11:21 AM Rating: Excellent
__DEL__1591795708123
4 posts
Ok, I made this post way back when but now I can't find it so I wanted to re-post the info so that way it would be at the top.

There is a lot of misinformation and speculation on how to acquire the club, but I will give you the 100% sure-fire way on how to hunt for the Undead Jester.

First of all, I would like to say I have spent many, many, many hours in Kurn's, and know every little corner of that tower. I have hunted every mob in the place and killed them all repeatedly. I have acquired many Berserker Clubs, enough to equip and to make a tidy profit (back when the club was the bling-bling).
Anyway, here's the scoop:

First, please refer to the Kurn's Tower map here:

  • http://www.eqatlas.com/kunark/kurnslowermap.html


    • This map claims that the Jester spawns at location marked 1. This is incorrect (but close).

    The Jester is a walker. He will never pop as a stationary spawn. He will never pop inside one of the rooms in the "Stable".

    Jester placeholders:

    Since the Jester is a walker, you need to kill all the other walkers in a specific area. This area is the L-shaped hallway that runs through both of the Stable areas.

    To be exact, look at the map and locate number 3. The Jester route begins just northwest of number 3, right before you enter the first Stable area. He then walks north (past #2), makes a left turn where the hallway turns west, then walks to the end of the hallway, turns around, and walks back.

    The very best spot to camp the Jester is just north of #2, in the corner, facing southwest so you can see both ends of the hallway. While you wait there, eliminate any walking mob that comes into your corner. You can safely ignore any mob that walks in and out of any of the Stable rooms. The Jester placeholders are only those mobs that walk the entire length of the L-shaped hallway.

    The picture of the Undead Jester in the Bestiary ( http://eqbeastiary.allakhazam.com/search.shtml?id=4974) was sent in by me. If you look closely, you can see that I am in that corner, facing southwest, and I am fighting the Jester that has aggroed on me.

    Most placeholders will be regular skels or burynai, but sometimes you will see the Burynai Forager or other named skels. Some drop loot, some drop quest items, and most drop Fine Steel.

    Nothing you do will have any impact on popping the Jester besides clearing the walking mobs in the corner of the L-shaped hallway in the middle of the Stables.

    Most Jester pops do not result in the club, but will instead annoy you with Fine Steel. Have patience, keep clearing the walkers, and you will get one eventually.

    I wish all the best of luck, and hope my information helped.


    Carnifex
    Tallon Zek

    Edited, Thu Feb 26 11:25:48 2004
    ▲ Page top
    Jester Spawn Info
    QuoteReply

    __DEL__1593362752473

    So my 21 SK and Sons 21 Necro are going to get Skeletal Feet for the DS SK armor. All of a sudden this jester comes up and starts swinging at me so we kill him in like 10 seconds and I loot an IBC and was like hey look at this. Then 25 min later he came back and my son got one to. I said hey this might be worth something. He said I'm gonna try to sell it for 5k. ROFL! We both had a good laugh over that one.
    ▲ Page top
    A Great Present for my Monk
    QuoteReply
    # Jun 02 2003 at 4:55 PM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1592257211009
    7 posts
    Ok heres my story, I camped Jester Sunday June 1st. Started at 8am and finished at 5pm. I killed everything in stables. Got the Cook to spawn twice, both times with no Shield. Burnyai Forager once. Finally on the 9th hour of camp, Jester spawns with club in hand. I took him out quickly. My advice to anyone who wants this club, have lots of patience, Kill everything in the stables. On the Cook's side of Stables, the only thing i killed was in Cook's room. I'll break down the spawns and their locations. Starting with the 6 rooms adjacent from the Cook's side. There are 2 spawns that roam here. Usually undead. This is said to be the Forager's Placeholders. I beg to differ. When the Forager spawned, he came down the hall that has the room with the hole in the wall that leads to Bargynn. Ok, once you make the left and turn the corner. There are 6 more rooms, (including the room with the hole in the back wall). I'll number the rooms for ya from left to right. Room #1 (Hole Room/First room on left) has to spawns inside, usually Burnyai, and 1 roams across the hall to Room 6 (First room on right). Room 2-6 has 1 spawn, always a Undead. The hallway outside of the 6 rooms have 2 spawns that roam as soon as they spawn. These 2 are what I believe to be are Placeholders for Forager and Jester. I believe that when its time for a Rare to spawn from these 2 Placeholders, you'll get either Forager or Jester. Thats just my guess. Anyway thats my story. Good luck and have lots of Patience when camping the IBC.

    Trakmaster Mastatracka 30th Lvl Ranger
    State Of Chaos Tholuxe Server

    Dolandor Fistofury 31st Lvl Monk
    State Of Chaos Tholuxe Server

    Just bought one
    QuoteReply
    # Dec 02 2002 at 11:45 AM Rating: Decent
    __DEL__1593362134136
    11 posts
    Late last Saturday night, a guy in the bazaar was selling this for 300 plat. I sent a /tell to him saying I wanted to buy the piece, but only had 258 plat (which at the time, was true). Well, I was pretty lucky because he accepted, I got the IBC for a ridiculously low price, and my cleric has a good replacement for his Centi Warhammer. By the way, I've been monitoring the price of this piece ever since, and have never seen it for less than 1100 plat (on the Seventh Hammer server). Looks wicked equipped, with a spike in the front and the back. My cleric was ecstatic)IMHO, this weapon is better than the Centi Warhammer because: Faster delay, better wisdom, good proc.

    Despedis Darkmoor
    Cleric of the 38th season
    Innoruuk
    Seventh Hammer

    # Oct 01 2002 at 4:01 AM Rating: Default
    Debalic
    Prodigal Son
    20,643 posts
    ...in addition to Centi Warhammer :) My 23 ranger needs to get 1hb up, Centi is too slow. But drop it to offhand, put this IBC in primary, and off I go! The combined stats are nice, as well as proc.
    So I guess I'm in for a long camp here - at least there's still a lot of dark blues =) Maybe I'll get lucky and find some Burynai Hide gear for minor upgrades.
